answers.question: Value for field: 63eeddc4-305a-425c-8547-555271a5e885
answers.answer:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my profound interest in the Chief Information Officer position at your esteemed organization, as advertised. With over 28 years of extensive experience in enterprise technology, including 5+ years at the CIO/VP level in complex, multi-site global organizations, I am confident in my ability to spearhead your technology agenda and drive transformative growth.

My career journey, predominantly across the UK, Europe, MENA, and Asia-Pacific, has equipped me with a global perspective and a proven track record in defining and executing multi-year technology strategies. I have led comprehensive technology stacks covering infrastructure, enterprise applications (including major ERP transformations like Oracle, SAP S/4 HANA, Microsoft D365), data and analytics, integration fabrics, and robust cybersecurity frameworks. My experience leading IT for a ~$21 Billion global logistics entity (DP World) and a $2.5 Billion restaurant operator (Americana Restaurants) aligns directly with your requirement for leadership in large-scale, institutionally governed environments.

I bring a clear vision for the future state of enterprise technology, balancing in-house innovation with strategic partner engagements to deliver tangible value. My expertise extends to building data foundations, embedding data-led decision-making, and ensuring stringent cybersecurity postures and compliance with regulations such as the National Cybersecurity Authority and Personal Data Protection Law. Furthermore, my strong commercial instinct and P&L accountability ensure technology investments are strategically aligned and deliver measurable business outcomes. I am adept at translating complex technological landscapes into commercial language for executive committees and boards.

I have a demonstrated history of driving significant initiatives, including the successful implementation and modernization of ERP systems, developing innovative mobile and AI solutions (e.g., GenAI-powered PWAs, agentic AI pilots for HR/Finance), and establishing service-oriented IT operations with clear metrics. My certifications, including PMP, PRINCE2, and MSP Advanced Practitioner, underscore my commitment to disciplined program delivery and vendor management.

My deep experience in the MENA region, coupled with my comprehensive understanding of modern enterprise technology, makes me an ideal candidate to lead your technology function as a peer to the executive team. I am particularly excited by the opportunity to contribute to a well-established Saudi organization and am fluent in English.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how my leadership and technical acumen can benefit your organization.

Sincerely,
Mohit Mendiratta
